'''Damonite Yors-B''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|cold]], [[Water/Legends|icy]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] that was a possible location of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] during her kidnapping nine [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

The [[Death Seed]] plague-infested ''[[Corbantis]]'' was disposed of by [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] on Damonite Yors-B, but seventeen members of the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] crew survived by huddling around the ship's [[Reactor/Legends|reactor core]]: the radiation killed off the [[Droch/Legends|droch]] infecting them. These seventeen were rescued by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. They were taken to [[Nim Drovis]] and treated by the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] Dr. [[Ism Oolos]].
